purpose: Compute matched DEU/native evidences with the same full-objective likelihood set and declared priors.
notes: Requires actual nested/evidence run; this preflight only prepares inputs.

purpose: Use readiness-cleared posterior chains as inputs to a separately validated bridge estimator.
notes: Must validate estimator assumptions and normalization before any evidence claim.

purpose: Run matched tempered chains for a direct marginal-likelihood estimate.
notes: More expensive; useful if bridge/nested estimates disagree.
Information criteria are not Bayes factors and cannot by themselves support superiority claims here.

purpose: Evidence including TT_lite on both sides.
notes: Current production chains exclude TT_lite; do not retrofit TT_lite evidence claims.
